CREATE TABLE events (EventID UInt32, EventTime DateTime, EventDate Date);
SELECT EventID, EventTime, runningDifference(EventTime) AS delta FROM (SELECT EventID, EventTime FROM events WHERE EventDate = '2016-11-24' ORDER BY EventTime ASC) AS ordered_events;
SELECT EventID, runningDifference(EventTime) AS delta FROM events WHERE EventDate = '2016-11-24' ORDER BY EventTime DESC;
SELECT number, runningDifference(number) AS diff FROM numbers(10) WHERE number > 0;
SELECT number, runningDifference(number + 1) AS diff FROM numbers_table WHERE diff != 1 ORDER BY number;
SELECT x, runningDifference(x) AS diff FROM t1 ORDER BY x;
SELECT a.EventID, b.EventID, runningDifference(a.EventTime) AS delta FROM events a JOIN events b ON a.EventID = b.EventID WHERE a.EventDate = '2016-11-24' ORDER BY a.EventTime ASC;
SELECT EventID, runningDifference(EventTime) AS delta FROM (SELECT EventID, EventTime FROM events WHERE EventDate = '2016-11-24' ORDER BY EventTime ASC) AS ordered_events WHERE delta > 0;
SELECT number, runningDifference(number) AS diff FROM numbers(100) WHERE diff < 0;
